name: iShares S&P GSCI Commodity-Indexed Trust
business: The Trust seeks to track the results, before expenses and liabilities, of the S&P GSCI Total Return Index (the Index), which represents a diversified, fully collateralized investment in futures contracts. The Trust's assets consist of long positions in exchange-traded index futures contracts on the S&P GSCI Excess Return Index, together with cash, U.S. Treasury securities or other short-term securities eligible as margin deposits. Shares are offered to investors through authorized participants and trade on NYSE Arca, providing retail and institutional investors exposure to commodity futures.
namedSuppliers: State Street Bank and Trust Company
